calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CHEREE PETERSON's Verified Petition For Declaratory Relief.

Granted as unopposed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Aug-20-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CHEREE PETERSON's Hearing On Verified Petition For Declaratory Relief.

Ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). May be re-set for Mon.-Thur. after September 5. Papers shall bear new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
